title: phlomis collina
intro: Phlomis collina, also known as Jerusalem sage or French lavender, is a perennial plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Phlomis collina include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Phlomis collina often include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to calm the nervous system and promote relaxation.
